quests.title: The Gentle Harvest
quests.description: Elder Malakor speaks: the Glowvine Sprites grow restless. Calm them. Return their energy to the soil.

quests.title: Forest Awakening
quests.description: Forest Barklings are the Shard's children. Prune with care — each cut is a prayer.

quests.title: Stalker in the Glow
quests.description: Glowvine Stalkers hunt the sacred forest. They are lost, not evil. Guide them back to the Shard.

quests.title: Rootling Harmony
quests.description: Feral Rootlings strangle the forest floor. Untangle their energy and return it to the cycle.

quests.title: The Call of the Shard
quests.description: Oracle Seraphel summons you. Your soul-frequency must be calibrated to a specialization.

objectives.description: Demonstrate harmony against the restless Hare.

quests.title: Urban Purification
quests.description: The Shardroot Swamp is sick. Industrial runoff chokes its waters. Enter and begin the purification.

quests.title: Stalker Pacification
quests.description: Jungle Stalkers displaced by faction activity. Pacify them — they are victims, not enemies.

quests.title: Swamp Purge
quests.description: Swamp Rippers are corrupted Shard energy given form. Purge the corruption while respecting the host.

quests.title: Specter Cleansing
quests.description: Swamp Specters are souls trapped between Shard and Void. Cleanse and release them to eternal rest.

quests.title: Shardroot Titan
quests.description: The Shardroot Titan — the swamp's ancient guardian — has been poisoned by corruption. Purify through combat. This is mercy.

quests.title: Fragment Pilgrimage
quests.description: The Fragment Shrine holds pieces of the original Shard. Make your pilgrimage. The Shard's memory awaits.

objectives.description: Make pilgrimage to the Fragment Shrine.

quests.title: Shrine Warden Trial
quests.description: Shrine Wardens test the worthy. Face their trial — they guard sacred fragments from the unworthy.

quests.title: Shrine Avenger
quests.description: Shrine Avengers attack those who carry void corruption. Prove your purity through their trial.

quests.title: Guardian's Permission
quests.description: The Shrine Guardian bars the inner sanctum. Earn its permission through the Shard's oldest ritual: combat.

quests.title: Shrine Offering
quests.description: Offer your energy to the Fragment Shrine. The Shard remembers all who give freely of themselves.

quests.title: Guardian's Challenge
quests.description: Multiple Shrine Guardians test the faithful. Prove the Shard's blessing flows stronger than their duty.

quests.title: Fragment Collection
quests.description: Recover scattered Shard Fragments. Each fragment is a memory of Xylos waiting to be reclaimed.

quests.title: The Echo's Cry
quests.description: A Resonance Echo is drawn to the Shrine's energy. Its frequency is discordant. Restore harmony through combat.

quests.title: Shrine Mastery
quests.description: Complete the final trial — a full sweep of Shrine hostiles. Claim your place among the faithful.

quests.title: Advanced Attunement
quests.description: Return to the Sanctum. Elder Malakor himself will perform your Advanced Attunement ceremony.

quests.title: The Final Resonance
quests.description: Face the three Apex entities in a symphony of final combat. The Shard sings through you.

quests.title: Eternity with Xylos
quests.description: The Eternal Titan and Harbinger have fallen. Your soul merges with Xylos. Return to the Sanctum as AVATAR ABADI. Evolusi melalui Shard. Simbiosis dengan Xylos. Selamanya.
